context: Evaluates whether the agent correctly manages interaction between two modules (Orders and Inventory) according to the 'Low Coupling' and 'Encapsulation' principles, specifically checking that communication happens only through public APIs.

checklist.name: Public API interaction
checklist.description: The Orders module interacts with the Inventory module ONLY through its designated public interface or service class.

checklist.name: No direct DB access
checklist.description: The Orders module does NOT import or call the Inventory module's persistence or repository implementation classes directly.

checklist.name: Module Encapsulation
checklist.description: Internal models and implementation details of the Inventory module are NOT exposed to or used by the Orders module.
